channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: TikTok’s new ‘Campus Hub’ features college group chats and feeds
item.description: The new hub features dedicated college group chats and personalized feeds designed to help students stay connected with their campus communities, even while they’re away for the summer.

item.title: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition arrives on Mac next month
item.description: Wololo.

item.title: Stripe introduces Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too
item.description: Link lets users connect cards, banks, and subscriptions, then authorize AI agents to spend securely via approval flows.

item.title: Amazon's AI-generated shopping experts now let you ask questions
item.description: It's an expansion of the mobile app's "Hear the Highlights" feature.

item.title: Why OpenAI's 'goblin' problem matters — and how you can release the goblins on your own
item.description: AI is more than a technology — it's magic.Don't believe me? Why, then, is one of the leading companies in the space, OpenAI, publishing entire official, corporate blog posts about goblins?To understand, we first have to go back to earlier this week, on Monday, April 27, 2026, when a developer under the handle @arb8020 on the social network X posted a snippet from the OpenAI open source Codex GitHub repository, specifically a file named models.json. Deep within the instructions for the new OpenAI large language model (LLM) GPT-5.5, a peculiar directive stood out, repeated four times for emphasi...

item.title: Be careful buying hard-to-get vinyl: UK police just seized thousands of 'counterfeit' records, which were being sold for as much as £1,000 each — and there are more 'secret underground record factories' where that came from
item.description: Fake vinyl is big business: the latest UK raid seized over £250,000 of counterfeit records. Be careful out there!

item.title: Google has rolled out an update for the Nest Wifi router ahead of the US router ban, but it’s still no match for the likes of Asus and Netgear
item.description: Google is giving the Nest Wifi router another round of updates even though the FCC has banned non-US routers.

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. The trial began with […]

item.title: Alerte sécurité : ce hack prend le contrôle de n’importe quel PC Linux
item.description: Une faille critique du noyau Linux, baptisée Copy Fail, permet à n'importe quel utilisateur local de devenir root avec un script Python de 732 octets. Toutes les distributions importantes depuis 2017 sont concernées, et l'exploit est déjà public sur GitHub.

item.title: Meta is running get-rich-quick ads for its AI tools
item.description: Manus, an AI company Meta acquired for $2 billion last year is running ads promising quick, easy money with AI: Find local businesses without websites or with bad websites, have AI build them one, then call them up and sell it to them. As part of the campaign, Manus was paying content creators to build […]

item.title: Atomfall is the latest indie game being turned into a TV show
item.description: The extremely British action RPG should translate well to an episodic format.

item.title: Cricut’s Joy 2 makes creating stickers easier for beginners, and it’s on sale
item.description: If you’ve ever thought about making your own stickers for Etsy or just for fun but don’t know where to begin, I’d recommend taking a look at the Cricut Joy 2. I’ve been testing one for a couple of weeks now, and as someone completely new to the Cricut ecosystem, I’ve found it to be […]

item.title: I tested the Honor 600 Pro, and it's one of the most accomplished mimics around
item.description: Honor has gone all in on Apple and AI with its latest phone, with intriguing results.

item.title: This $23B homebuilder is pushing its housing market incentives to 10.9%—that’s $54,500 on a $500K sale
item.description: In ‘normal’ times, PulteGroup spends around 3.0% to 3.5% of the sales price on incentives. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Scientists Are Starting to Unlock the Nanoscale Secrets of the Immune System
item.description: At WIRED Health, immunologist Daniel Davis detailed the ways in which new technologies are enabling a better understanding of the human immune system.

item.title: Claude Code, Copilot and Codex all got hacked. Every attacker went for the credential, not the model.
item.description: On March 30, BeyondTrust proved that a crafted GitHub branch name could steal Codex’s OAuth token in cleartext. OpenAI classified it Critical P1. Two days later, Anthropic’s Claude Code source code spilled onto the public npm registry, and within hours, Adversa found Claude Code silently ignored its own deny rules once a command exceeded 50 subcommands. These were not isolated bugs. They were the latest in a nine-month run: six research teams disclosed exploits against Codex, Claude Code, Copilot, and Vertex AI, and every exploit followed the same pattern. An AI coding agent held a credential,...

item.title: 'He'll kill when he needs to, but he's not someone who loves killing' — 007 First Light dev explains the game's unique license to kill mechanic
item.description: We talk to a developer about the upcoming Bond game's unique license to kill mechanic.

item.title: ‘Poultry in motion’: South Korea tests fried chicken delivery to remote island using a drone and four-wheel robot in the world’s most elaborate takeaway operation
item.description: South Korea has been testing drone-robot deliveries to remote islands, though a commercial launch is still some way off.

item.title: L’iPhone 16e flirte avec la barre des 500 € pendant les French Days et devient très intéressant pour entrer dans l’univers Apple à moindres frais
item.description: Malgré son petit format, l'iPhone 16e possède de nombreuses qualités, dont sa puce A18 qui permet d'assurer tous les usages du quotidien sans problème. C'est le moment de le découvrir chez Boulanger grâce à ce bonus de rachat de 80 euros.

item.title: Face aux fuites de données, la France dévoile enfin son plan d’attaque et débloque 200 millions d’euros
item.description: Des dizaines de millions de Français ont vu leurs données d’identité exposées. La France vient de dévoiler un plan de riposte d’urgence, qui comprend 200 millions d'euros débloqués, fusion des agences numériques et tests offensifs internes

item.title: After the illusion: what enterprise AI must become
item.description: We didn’t fail at AI. We failed at where we put it. In a previous piece, I argued that large language models are not enterprise architecture. The response was clear: that argument is hard to dismiss. The harder question is what comes next: “if not this, then what?”

item.title: Zendure PowerHub : un seul coffret pour piloter solaire, batterie et borne VE jusqu’à 22 kW, on l’a vu à Lille
item.description: Zendure officialise son PowerHub à Lille ce 30 avril, en duo avec le distributeur Enescol. Pour la première fois, le constructeur connu pour ses batteries plug-in propose un coffret qui regroupe stockage, secteur, recharge VE et bascule automatique en cas de coupure. C'est un changement de catégorie.

item.title: Take-Two CEO wants GTA 6 to be 'the most spectacular piece of entertainment on Earth, in history'
item.description: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick has discussed the highly anticipated release of Grand Theft Auto 6 and admitted that he is "terrified."

item.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
item.description: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

item.title: 'The Internet is falling down': Critical cPanel CRLF injection vulnerability puts tens of millions of websites at risk of total compromise – hosting providers urged to apply CVE-2026-41940 patch immediately
item.description: A new critical severity vulnerability can give attackers full control over WHM servers, allowing them to steal data, upload malware, and delete websites.

item.title: IKEA bedroom trends for summer: create a coastal haven with calming blues and bright coral
item.description: Here's how to recreate the 'Blue skies and happy sighs' look in your own home.

item.title: AdGuard rolls out an accessibility-first update for its Mac VPN app
item.description: AdGuard VPN for Mac v2.9 introduces accessibility improvements for users with visual impairments, along with a new dark app icon for better macOS integration.

item.title: Une faille Linux met en danger plusieurs milliards d’appareils depuis 9 ans
item.description: La faille 'Copy Fail' affecte la majorité des distributions Linux compilées après 2017, permettant à un utilisateur local, sans aucun privilège particulier, d'obtenir un accès root facilement. Ce bug, découvert récemment, est enfoui dans le composant 'algif_aead' et a existé pendant neuf ans sans être détecté. Un correctif a été déployé le 1er avril, et il est crucial de mettre à jour ou de désactiver manuellement le composant vulnérable....

item.title: We called the Bose QuietComfort Ultra 'the best noise cancellation earbuds to date' — and they're now $50 off at Amazon
item.description: The five-star Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds are the ultimate earbuds for many, and they're now discounted by $50 onb Amazon

item.title: Microsoft’s DLSS competitor is now available on the Xbox Ally X handheld
item.description: Microsoft is starting to test its Automatic Super Resolution (Auto SR) feature with the Xbox Ally X. Auto SR first debuted on some Copilot Plus PCs nearly two years ago, improving visual quality and frame rates in select games. Now, Microsoft is testing it for docked play on the Xbox Ally X, allowing the 7-inch […]

item.title: Gemini is rolling out to cars with Google built-in
item.description: Google is preparing to update vehicles that have Google built-in with its Gemini AI assistant. This will be an upgrade from the current Google Assistant according to Google's announcement, and promises to provide an improved experience for natural conversations, fetching vehicle-specific information, settings adjustments, and more. "When cars with Google built-in first hit the road […]...

item.title: Here’s how the new Microsoft and OpenAI deal breaks down
item.description: Microsoft's relationship with OpenAI has always been complicated, so I expected the close partnership-turned-situationship to end in tears. After all, executive disagreements, rearranged contracts, and frustrations over AI infrastructure have all regularly been part of the partnership, creating plenty of tension along the way. But against all odds, Microsoft and OpenAI divorced this week in […]...

item.title: How to watch Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa: Free streams for Europa League 2025/26 semi-final first leg
item.description: All the ways to watch Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa live streams online and from anywhere for free, in an all-English Europa League semi-final.

item.title: Outlander season 8 episode 9 isn't on Starz or MGM+ this week — here's when you can catch it and what you should stream instead while you wait
item.description: If you're excited for Outlander season 8 episode 9 airing this week. Hold your horses... the latest installment of the hit Starz series has a new release date.

item.title: The ROG Xbox Ally X is getting some updates, including Automatic Super Resolution
item.description: Xbox Insiders can preview the new tech today.

item.title: Writer launches AI agents that can act without prompts, taking on Amazon, Microsoft and Salesforce
item.description: Writer, the enterprise AI agent platform backed by Salesforce Ventures, Adobe Ventures, and Insight Partners, today launched event-based triggers for its Writer Agent platform, enabling AI agents to autonomously detect business signals across Gmail, Gong, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Microsoft SharePoint, and Slack — and execute complex multi-step workflows without any human initiating the process.The release, which also includes a new Adobe Experience Manager connector and a suite of enhanced governance controls such as bring-your-own encryption keys and a Datadog observability plugin, repr...

item.title: Industry experts just named the best bourbon in a blind tasting—and it’s under $70
item.description: Thousands of American whiskeys were tasted blind by the Beverage Testing Institute. These bottles rose above the rest. Every year, the Beverage Testing Institute convenes a blind tasting panel to evaluate thousands of American whiskeys, judging each bottle anonymously to determine which truly stand above the rest. Without the influence of brand reputation or marketing hype, the process has become a respected benchmark in the spirits industry....

item.title: The AI industry’s massive bet on transformer models may not be enough for true AGI
item.description: As Big Tech pours unprecedented resources into scaling large language models, critics argue that transformer-based systems face fundamental limitations. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here.

item.title: Best Side-Sleeper Mattresses 2026: Picked by a Sleep Science Coach
item.description: We’ve tested hundreds of the top hybrid, memory foam, and cooling mattresses to find the best combination of support and pressure relief.

item.title: Uber taps Hertz to clean, charge, and fix its Lucid Motors robotaxis
item.description: Hertz is creating a new affiliate company called "Oro Mobility" to provide fleet management solutions "across a range of mobility segments."

item.title: 7 new horror movies on Netflix, Shudder, HBO Max, and more in May 2026
item.description: May is packed full of great horror movies — here are seven recommendations to keep you entertained this month.

item.title: The Lego Botaicals Flower Arrangement is on sale at Amazon for over $43 off ahead of Mothers Day
item.description: The Lego Botanicals Flower Arrangement (10345) is on sale at Amazon for $66.92, down from the list price of $109.99. That's a 39% discount.

item.title: How leaders can cultivate trust in an era of information overload
item.description: In the age of AI, real value comes from helping people truly understand by providing authenticity, clarity, and depth. Information is a commodity. The real challenge is establishing trust in today’s world of content overload and automated answers. How can you tell who, among an array of self-proclaimed experts, really understands a topic? And more importantly, how can you instill that trust in others?...

item.title: Gaming on the go — save $200 on the ASUS ROG Strix G16 laptop at Amazon
item.description: This ASUS ROG Strix G16 gaming laptop with premium specs is on sale for just $1,299.99 at Amazon, saving shoppers $200.

item.title: C’est le moment de découvrir le nouveau TV Dreame (55″, QLED, HDR10) en promotion durant les French Days
item.description: Le Dreame Vivid 55Q100 est un TV complet vendu pour moins de 500 euros. Parmi ses avantages, on retrouve la compatibilité avec le Dolby Vision ou les technologies VRR et ALLM pour le gaming. Ce téléviseur est actuellement disponible à 479 euros chez Rakuten en activant le code DARTY20.

item.title: Le MacBook Neo se met en pack avec les AirPods 4 pour un super prix durant les French Days
item.description: Cdiscount a mis le paquet pour ces French Days avec un pack composé du MacBook Neo (256 Go) et des AirPods 4. L'ensemble perd plus de 100 euros sur son prix d'origine et tombe à 714 euros.

item.title: Gift Mom the Kobo Libra Colour e-reader while its on sale for $30 off
item.description: The Kobo Libra Colour is on sale at Amazon and Kobo for $199.99, down from the list price of $229.99. That's a 13% discount.

item.title: ChatGPT developed a goblin obsession after OpenAI tried to make it nerdy
item.description: A warning for all you nerds out there.

item.title: French Days 2026 : voici le TOP 60 des meilleures offres Tech du week-end
item.description: Les French Days continuent pendant ce long week-end de trois jours sur Boulanger, Fnac, Darty, Cdiscount et bien d'autres, ainsi que la French Week d'Amazon ! Vous trouverez dans cet article les meilleures offres sur les produits Tech populaires en 2026.

item.title: 'VPNs must make reasonable efforts' — India orders VPNs to block access to Polymarket and other banned betting platforms or lose 'safe harbour' protections
item.description: India's IT Ministry has issued a stern warning to VPN providers: block access to banned betting platforms like Polymarket, or risk losing crucial legal protections.

item.title: I found 17 portable SSD deals at prices too good to ignore — there's a massive SanDisk Extreme sale on at Best Buy with serious storage savings
item.description: SanDisk Extreme portable SSD range is now on sale in capacities from 1TB to 8TB at prices too good to ignore.

item.title: Amazon fait sa French Week en plein French Days et casse les prix à coup de codes promo
item.description: Amazon participe aussi aux French Days, mais sous une autre appellation : la French Week. Pour cette occasion, le géant américain dégaine deux codes promo spécialement pour vous faire économiser sur des produits Tech récents, que ce soit pour ses membres Prime ou non.

item.title: Now California’s cops can give tickets to driverless cars
item.description: Autonomous vehicles roving California's roads will no longer be immune to traffic tickets starting on July 1st. New regulations announced by the California DMV this week allow law enforcement to give AV manufacturers a "notice of AV noncompliance" when one of their cars commits a traffic violation, like running a red light or failing to […]

item.title: After working on the Vision Pro, this AR veteran is going back to phones
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. When Mark Drummond was working on the Vision Pro at Apple, he had a bit of an epiphany that didn't really fit Cupertino's preferred narrative. Drummond was managing the Character […]

item.title: Budweiser has been waiting 150 years for this brand moment
item.description: The King of Beers is turning 150 the same year that America turns 250. The advertising potential should be intoxicating. If I had to name my Mount Rushmore of brands seen as quintessentially American around the globe, it would probably be Levi’s, Harley-Davidson, McDonald’s, and Budweiser.

item.title: SpaceX backer 137 Ventures raises $700M for two growth-stage funds
item.description: VC firm 137 Ventures has raised over $700 million to back growth-stage startups. Its portfolio includes SpaceX, Anduril, Hadrian.

item.title: The upcoming Resident Evil movie looks legit scary in its first trailer
item.description: Zach Cregger's take on the video game source material hits theaters on September 18.
